ddls:
CREATE TABLE "majors" (
  "major_code" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each major */,
  "major" TEXT /* Name of the major */,
  "major_category" TEXT /* Category of the major (e.g., Agriculture & Natural Resources) */,
  "degree_level" TEXT /* Level of the degree (e.g., Bachelor's, Master's, Doctorate) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department offering the major */,
  "program_duration" INTEGER /* Typical duration of the program in years */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the major */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("major_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_stats" (
  "major_code" INTEGER /* Reference to the major code */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the employment statistics */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution */,
  "total" INTEGER /* Total number of graduates in that major */,
  "employed" INTEGER /* Number of employed graduates */,
  "employed_fulltime_yearround" INTEGER /* Number of employed graduates full-time year-round */,
  "unemployed" INTEGER /* Number of unemployed graduates */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate for the major */,
  "p25th" INTEGER /* 25th percentile salary */,
  "median" INTEGER /* Median salary */,
  "p75th" INTEGER /* 75th percentile salary */,
  "part_time_employment" INTEGER /* Number of graduates employed part-time */,
  "self_employment" INTEGER /* Number of graduates who are self-employed */,
  "industry_sector" TEXT /* Industry sector of employment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("major_code", "year", "institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "institutions" (
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "institution_name" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the institution */,
  "institution_type" TEXT /* Type of institution (e.g., public, private, community college) */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the institution's website */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the institution */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the institution was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_submissions" (
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each submission */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution submitting data */,
  "major_code" INTEGER /* Reference to the major code */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was submitted */,
  "submission_status" TEXT /* Status of the submission (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the submission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_submissions_major_code FOREIGN KEY ("major_code") REFERENCES majors ("major_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_submissions_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend entry */,
  "major_code" INTEGER /* Reference to the major code */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the trend observation */,
  "employment_rate" REAL /* Employment rate for that year */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution */,
  "industry_sector" TEXT /* Industry sector of employment */,
  "part_time_employment_rate" REAL /* Rate of part-time employment */,
  "self_employment_rate" REAL /* Rate of self-employment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_trends_major_code FOREIGN KEY ("major_code") REFERENCES majors ("major_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_trends_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, faculty, student) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "accessed_table" TEXT /* Name of the accessed table */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the platform */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
